ticket.description:
We do not have our business anymore nor do we have WooPos or Woo commerce. We shouldn't be getting charged for anything. 
If this is an automatic payment this should be reversed. There hasn't been a business nor a website, since Oct 2025.


Tammy Kleis & Kelly Turns

comments.body:
Hello Tammy Kleis and Les Standerfer,

Good Day!

We could not locate any store registered with us using the email id botaniclifeusa@gmail.com or sudlow01@yahoo.com or syed@woopos.com

Could you please share the following about your case so that we can check and assist you further?


- Store URL -
- Registered email id -
- Plugin name used by you -
- Invoice of the recent charge.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Tammy Kleis and Kelly Turns,

Thank you for your response and sharing the details.

We have checked the store and could observe that the plugin was not uninstalled from your store and the subscription was not cancelled.

As this is a recurring payment, you were charged for the plugin.

Please allow us some time to forward your case for subscription cancellation and refund of the last charge.

We will update you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Tammy Kleis and Kelly Turns,
 
Thank you for your response and sharing the details.
 
We have checked the store and could observe that the plugin was not uninstalled from your store and the subscription was not cancelled.
 
As this is a recurring payment, you were charged for the plugin.
 
Please allow us some time to forward your case for subscription cancellation and refund of the last charge.
 
We will update you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1777272473279789

WSS Subscription cancellation and Refund request.
US Customer used the plugin for with UPS and Stamps USPS for rates and labels.
Customer stopped their store after Oct, 2025 and the plugin has not been used post that.
Customer was on Yearly Starter ($99) and has been charged for it again on Apr 26, 2026 (**Invoice ID - b36c14d4-d4e5-452c-97fd-00b9023decb7**).
Please cancel the subscription for the plugin and refund the latest charge.

URL: https://botaniclifeusa.com
Account ID: a75d6f94-7c32-4231-b69e-0e184040da46
Payment Subscription ID: I-F4JB9DJ3AV1L
